In a robot coupe, add all ingredients except the butter and capers.
Pulse-blend the robot coupe until the mixture comes together similarly to mayonaise
Once it looks like Mayo, add butter slowly one tab at a time.
Continue pulse-blending until homogenous
Add capers last, pulsing the robot coupe only to combine
Reserve in quart containers in the cooler
